name: Bean Soup (Santa Maria)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the soaked beans in fresh water for 10 minutes.
2. Drain.
3. In a soup pot, heat the olive oil and gently fry the onion.
4. Add the remaining vegetables and seasonings. Stir well and add the beans.
5. Make sure all the vegetables are covered with oil, then pour in the stock.
6. Allow to simmer until the beans are cooked and the vegetables are tender.
